calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelsey Quaranto, via Zoom, for Mare-Christine Elmayan Broder, Petitioner.

Counsel is advised of the court's position regarding electronic service and that the CCP section does not apply to the probate code. Counsel offers advocacy on behalf of her attempts to provide notice via USPS (US Postal Service) to Russia but was advised that mail is not being currently sent to Russia via USPS. Counsel reports on additional efforts to provide notice. The court advises that it is accepting notice via probate code 13655. The court advises that it is taking the matter under submission with the intent to grant item numbers 1, 2, 3, and 5, but exclude item number 4. Counsel does not object to the court's tentative ruling.

The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
